text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning and start my day with a glass of water and a short meditation. After that, I have a light breakfast and review my to-do list for the day. I work from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. as a graphic designer, with a short break for lunch. In the evening around 6 p.m., I go for a 30-minute jog or do some stretching exercises. After dinner, I spend time reading or watching a series, then prepare for bed by 10 p.m. This routine helps me stay productive and balanced because it is consistent.
